name: Mushroom Dumpling
ingredients: 160g Dried Shiitake (Soak in 600g water to rehydrate)
steps: In a hot pan, fry the diced ginger
Once nicely browned, add blitzed rehydrated shiitake
Then add chopped fresh shiitake and chopped Oyster mushroom
Add and pinch of salt, then further to cook until wilted
Add shao xin wine and let it evaporate
Add soy sauce and taste mushroom
Add grated lotus root and cook to combine
Add Mushroom water and let it cook down and form a good consistency

other_details.each_portion: 1 tbsp chilli oil dressing, 1/2 tsp chilli pulp, 3 Piece dumplings
other_details.note: dumpling skin not to flap 水餃皮縮口要窄才會挺
